response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive experience as a Senior Full Stack Developer with over 6 years in senior roles, fitting the mid-senior level requirement. His expertise spans TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms, with a strong focus on clean, testable code and architecture decisions. His work on AI-agent infrastructure and AI-related tooling aligns well with the emerging technologies mentioned in the job description. While his primary stack is excellent, his limited direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest is a minor gap, but his adaptability and breadth of languages (TypeScript, Java, Kotlin, Python) mitigate this concern.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, matching the primary stack requirements.
Proven track record in AI-agent development and infrastructure, adding modern technical depth to the role.
Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail, demonstrated by contributions to scalable systems and open-source projects like GISCollective.
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest, which are primary stack requirements; however, adaptability suggests quick ramp-up.
Most recent role (Staff Software Engineer at re:cinq) is very brief (April 2025 - Present), raising questions about tenure stability.
Primary proficiency in MongoDB and Dlang, with less focus on PostgreSQL/MySQL, which are secondary but required database technologies.

key_factors.factor: AI-agent development and modern tech stack alignment
